channel.title: flove making-of — persistence questions
channel.description: New persistence design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: How should flove handle app state persistence?
item.description:
• Full session restore — All state persists — user returns exactly where they left off. Heavy, private. • Preferences only — Just settings and preferences persist. Light, useful. • Nothing (ephemeral) — No persistence — fresh start each time. Most private, least convenient. • User choice — Let user decide what persists per app. Flexible, more UI.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Preferences only
